description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the pipenv cache directory and virtual environment, defines a variable PIPENV_CACHE_DIR, and has a single test stage. In the test stage add a test job that uses the python:3.6.6 Docker image, runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq ffmpeg espeak libespeak-dev python3-numpy python-numpy libncurses-dev libncursesw5-dev sox, then pip install pipenv, then pipenv sync --dev, then pipenv run python -c "import nltk; nltk.download('punkt')", then pipenv run pytest --cov training_speech, and records coverage using the regex /TOTAL.*(\d{2}\.? (?:\d+)?)%/. No artifacts or rules.
